column1: # Every repo listed here is cloned into $WORKSPACE/<category>/<repo> by
# setup-workspace.sh. The GitHub org is always ai-pipestream — only the
# repo name and category are listed per row.
# To add a new repo: add a line, commit, and re-run setup-workspace.sh.
# The foundation: BOM, extensions, protos, and the platform services.
# Pipeline processors. Each one implements a gRPC module contract.
# Source connectors that feed documents into the pipeline.
# Plugins, test infrastructure, and dev-assets itself.
